description_long: This is a thick, hardbound book with a black cover adorned with ornate gold geometric patterns and decorative flourishes along the edges. The cover features a central rectangular design with intricate corner embellishments, giving it a classic, vintage appearance. The book's pages are visibly aged, with a warm, tan color and a slightly rough texture. The spine is richly decorated with gold motifs and contains a large, stylized title in gold, oriented horizontally. The book appears to be well-crafted, with a sturdy binding and a flat, solid surface. There are no visible illustrations or images on the cover apart from the decorative gold patterns.
description: A thick, vintage-style hardbound book with a black cover and ornate gold geometric decorations. The spine and cover feature intricate gold designs and a prominent title.
description_view_0: The book is seen from the short edge, showing the black cover with gold patterns and the thick, tan-colored pages.
description_view_1: The book is viewed from the long side, highlighting the full expanse of the black cover with gold decorations and the title in the center.
description_view_2: The opposite short edge is visible, again showing the ornate cover and the thickness of the book's pages.
description_view_3: The spine is fully visible, displaying elaborate gold designs and a large, stylized title in gold, oriented horizontally.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is black with ornate gold decorative patterns at the top, bottom, and center, and features a large, stylized title in gold oriented horizontally. The design is classic and elaborate, matching the cover's style.
